THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LA MAE, ALBERT BOLES, BARBARA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH STREET, #219, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE A JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID BACK RNT OF $1215. 00 AND UNLAWFUL DETAINTER DAMAGES OF $19.29 PER DAY FROM MARCH 2, 1995 TO APRIL 25, 1995, ALONG WITH COSTS OF $80.00 FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $2355.95.
